title: Ageable
description: Adds a timer for the entity to grow up. It can be accelerated by giving the entity the items it likes as defined by feedItems.

drop_items.description: List of items that are dropped when an entity grows up.

duration.description: Length of time before an entity grows up (-1 to always stay a baby).

feedItems.description: List of items that can be fed to the entity to grow it up.

growth.description: How much this item contributes to growth progress (0-1).

grow_up.description: Event to run when the entity grows up.
